# GitHub Copilot Instructions — cl303-ledger-clone-chavez

<!-- cl303-automation: start -->
## cl303 Automation

This repository is managed by the [cl303-automation](https://github.com/artisgarbage/cl303-automation) platform.
The automation creates branches, opens PRs, and runs the full test suite on your behalf.

### When working here independently (VS Code / Claude)

1. **Read `.cl303/learnings.md`** before starting — it contains accumulated knowledge about this codebase from prior automation runs.
2. **Append to `.cl303/learnings.md`** when you discover something useful (file conventions, gotchas, test patterns, etc.).
3. **Create a run file** in `.cl303/runs/<date>-<description>.md` when completing a significant feature.
4. **Keep this section current** — if you change the build setup, test runner, or key conventions, update the notes below.

### Quick reference

See `.cl303/README.md` for the full directory structure description.
<!-- cl303-automation: end -->
